latin: Explorator audax in sepulcrum descendit. sed cum faces accendisset, pavimentum serpentibus coopertum vidit. 'serpentes...' gemuit. 'cur serpentes esse oportuit?'
translation: The bold explorer descended into the tomb. But when he had lit the torches, he saw the floor covered with snakes. 'Snakes...' he groaned. 'Why did it have to be snakes?'
